title: Rose gold balloons,Metallic Rose Gold Balloons: 50 Pcs 12 inch Chrome Rose Gold Party Balloons Shiny Latex Helium Thicken Balloon for Girl Birthday Wedding Bridal Shower Bachelor Party Decoration
features: · Elegant Metallic Finish: This pack of 50 rose gold metallic balloons features a shiny chrome surface that is brighter and more reflective than standard latex balloons, adding a touch of sophisticated glamour to any event.

· Important Usage Notes: These balloons are designed for decorative use. They are not toys. Adult supervision is recommended during inflation and display. Please keep away from sharp objects and heat sources.
· Convenient Large Pack: With 50 balloons in one pack, you have enough to create stunning balloon garlands, arches,without the need for multiple purchases, simplifying your party planning process.

· Ideal for Multiple Celebrations: The versatile rose gold colour makes these balloons perfect party decorations for a wide range of occasions, including weddings, hen parties, birthdays, bridal showers, and other special celebrations.

· Versatile Inflation Options: These 12-inch latex balloons can be filled with either air or helium. When inflated with air, they can maintain their shape for several days; with helium, they can float for 8-12 hours, perfect for creating balloon arches or garlands.
description: Product description Rose Gold Balloons for Party Decorations Create a stunning and stylish atmosphere for your special occasion with RETWOT Metallic Rose Gold Balloons. Their chic rose gold chrome finish is perfect for adding a modern and elegant touch to your event decor. Product Features Premium Metallic Look: These balloons feature a shiny, metallic rose gold surface that catches the light beautifully, making them stand out from ordinary party balloons. Versatile Use: Ideal for various party themes and decorations, including wedding receptions, hen party (bachelorette party) celebrations, birthday parties, and bridal showers. They are excellent for creating balloon arches, garlands, or simply as individual decorations. Flexible Inflation: The balloons can be inflated with both air and helium, giving you flexibility in how you choose to decorate your venue for your celebration. Package Contents & Details 50 pieces of 12-inch metallic rose gold latex balloons. Note These are decorative latex balloons. They are not toys. For best results, please handle with care and keep away from direct heat or sharp objects. Safety Warning NO
